reviews.title: Decent
reviews.text: We went at an off season time of year. It was very quiet and not much to do. The town was quiet as well. We’ve been to Bermuda a few times and Hamilton had more going on.
reviews.room_type: Limited View, Guest room, 1 King, Balcony

reviews.title: Not the Bermuda hospitality we are accustomed to
reviews.positives: location
reviews.negatives: service

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Proximity to beach and size of rooms, excellent beach wait staff who brought delicious drinks and meals.
reviews.negatives:
Unduly long wait to check-in. 

Remote location - great for only staying though expensive to rely on hotel for all meals and snacks. 

Odd structure of the bathroom upon entry to room.

reviews.title: Upper class type relaxing resort with not much but sun and sand to enjoy with pleasant service
reviews.positives: Clean, adult oriented,great friendly staff. Plenty of pool and beach chairs.
reviews.negatives: Out of way location. Expensive to get to island attractions and shopping locations.  Property overpriced.  No entertainment in site.

reviews.title: Great hotel in a not so great location
reviews.positives: Everything is new and unkept. Yummy breakfasts, service was good too, room was of a good size, I am personally a big st. Regis designer fan haha, so I was enjoying every little detail in the room.
reviews.negatives:
Location is not great. It’s kinda far from everything except for crystal caves and tobacco bay beach. 
The beach itself is not a typical Bermuda amazing beach. It’s okay, but def nothing close to the horseshoe beach area.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: beautiful property and beach was stunning.
reviews.negatives:
It needed better options on the on-site store as there is not one close for things that you might need or forgot to pack. convenience options should be a available (e.g., Tylenol, snacks, drinks). 

It had limited options for eating and the bar hours were incredibly limited. No activities were made available and car transportation was limited as well.

reviews.title: Wonderful weekend!!!!!!
reviews.positives: The ambiance and the staff were exceptional
reviews.negatives: No complaints

reviews.title: Lovely anniversary trip w our small dog. Super friendly
reviews.positives: Privacy and not far walk to town (15minutes)
reviews.negatives: It’s on the east side, so if you like sunsets, it’s not the best, but the location is still serene

reviews.title: A wonderful stay and highly recommed
reviews.positives: Overall food was very good, great steaks, awesome burger and sushi rolls.  property was beautiful and felt very private, staff was very friendly and helpful, Water was a color blue i havent seen before and the snorkeling onsite and nearby was great.  Fort St. Catherine is nice too and free to hotel guests.  Rooms were spacious and clean.  And only 1hr-40min flight from New Jersey.  One photo is of Achilles Bay which is a 2 minute walk, beautiful little area with great snorkeling.  Infinity pools were great and one for adults only
reviews.negatives: Everything very expensive (we knew that going in but still a shock).  Only downfall to the property is they dont have a store with basic needs/incidentals.  Heard others saying "we just wanted to stop into the store a buy some sweets or bring back a soda but they have nothing"

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: My husband and I stayed here for our babymoon.  The facilities were gorgeous, the staff was so wonderful, helpful and kind. We loved the morning tea and coffee service and liked that this hotel was right on the beach. St. George is a quieter part of the island which was perfect for us, but other travelers who are looking for more activity and less beach access may prefer to stay in Hamilton instead.
reviews.negatives: While we loved Lina for lunch, BLT for dinner was not quite our cup of tea (not enough menu items in our opinion).  The Wharf restaurant which was a 20 min walk away was our favorite place for dinners during our stay.

reviews.title: We will be back!
reviews.positives: The clarity of the ocean water. The privacy of a smaller property. The beautiful bathrooms throughout the property. The staff was very kind.
reviews.negatives: Our restaurant experience took too long. We waited for over 2 hours, which got to be too long. The staff was very kind and attentive while we waited.

reviews.title: Very pricey but worth the stay!
reviews.positives: Beautiful hotel and best beach.
reviews.negatives: Cleaning staff for rooms were inconsistent.

reviews.title: Epic venue. Loved it.
reviews.positives: Loved the room sizes and free access to the fort st Katherine. Sunrise from the beach was awesome. Loved the secluded location on the island.
reviews.negatives: Felt quiet in the bar from 9.30ish.

reviews.title: I will be going back!
reviews.positives: The people, the people, the people. Bermudians are so friendly! I love the people, the island and the culture. The Dolphin quest at Naval Dockyard that I did with my family I will remember forever. The smile my 10 year old son had made me tear! Love Bermuda
reviews.negatives: Stayed longer

reviews.title: We’ll be back.
reviews.positives:
Location - Relaxed, Semi Reclusive
Amenities- Great dining, drinks and service
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: We loved our stay (it was very relaxing) and plan to return next year.
reviews.positives: The property was close to the airport. The property was clean and the food was good. The breakfast buffet was excellent. The hotel was clean and the room was very nice. The beach was beautiful and the view was beautiful (especially the sunrise and the sunset). The staff was professional and friendly - thank you Jonathan for all of your assistance. There was a shuttle to take you to neighborhood restaurants.
reviews.negatives:
I would recommend a small area where you could purchase snacks (chips, etc.). 
Also, the pillows were too flat.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Accommodations were very well represented and completely worth the money. The staff exceptional very friendly and goes above and beyond to accommodate all your needs and wants. Highly recommend and definitely will be returning.
reviews.negatives: Don't have any negatives. Cannot think of anything I would have them change.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Great staff and amenities
reviews.negatives: Bit too far from restaurants. Taxis were hard to get

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: The location and staff

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Great staff. Beautiful location.

reviews.title: Enttäuschung für ein St Regis
reviews.positives: Schönes privat Strand
reviews.negatives:
Die Zimmer waren nicht sauber ( Haaren überall im Badezimmer und Schlafzimmer ) Kaffee Gerät nicht eingestellt ( Kaffee überlief bei jeder Tasse ) Licht auf Nachttisch kaput , Uhr nicht eingestellt bei Zeitänderung ) Taxis bestellt 24 Uhr vorher war nicht gemacht , kein Service vom hotel nach dem Dorf 
Beim Essen waren viele Gerichte nicht da ( weil sie eine neue Karte bekamen , das sollte nicht mein Problem sein ) Schwimmbad war ziemlich kalt ( steht als verheizt gemeldet) Service am Strand war nicht gut  ( bringen die Karte und dann nichts mehr )
Das Essen war super … ( wenn es da war und auch Frühstück ist alles da und lecker aber teuer und Mann muss dann eine Cappuccino noch extra bezahlen )
Die Teppichen in dem Empfang und Schlafzimmer sind sehr schmutzig und voller Flecken

reviews.title: We komen terug!
reviews.positives:
Je kon van ons verblijf op het gelijkvloers zo het strand opstappen. 
Prachtig uitzicht en magnifiek ingerichte kamer.
reviews.negatives: Alles was perfect.

reviews.title: Beautiful spot, resort needs to finish getting their act together.
reviews.positives: The people were great, beach/pool area were awesome.
reviews.negatives: Many of the services you would think a prestigious name like St Regis would master in, they did not.  Room cleaning and room service issues, no entertainment area for a rainy day, Spa reservations and communications were lacking.  For the money you pay for a resort like this, these basic issues should not be occurring.

reviews.title: the hotel did not match the level of standard we expected to receive at any St Regis premises
reviews.positives: The beach and the room/size
reviews.negatives:
No water sports facilities which can be acceptable but there was not even a concierge desk to help you to organize any excursion etc.
There is only one restaurant available which is a steakhouse ! Even if I am not vegetarian, I might not like to eat only steaks in the evening.
We had a complaint about a specific situation concerning the service for which we wrote to the Manager but no one from the hotel staff did give us any feed back or contact us. In my opinion this was unacceptable for any hotel standard.

reviews.title: It was a most perfect and relaxing stay in paradise. Thank you!
reviews.positives: Everything!
reviews.negatives: Nothing!

reviews.title: Placentera
reviews.positives: Es un lugar muy tranquilo, especial si pretendes descansar . Tamaño óptimo de las habitaciones. Excelente gastronomía, su personal está muy dedicado a hacer que en tu estadía estés muy  bien atendido y a gusto. No se limitan en su atención (att Zaldy Barloon y Mano)
